NAVAREA XIX 61/16

ANDOYA SPACE CENTER WILL LAUNCH TWO SCIENTIFIC ROCKETS BETWEEN 0900 AND 1500 UTC FROM 24 JUNE TO 11 JULY.
SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO STAY OUTSIDE THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREA.

A. 70-07.0N 013-09.1E
B. 69-20.3N 014-53.3E
C. 69-38.0N 016-35.5E
D. 70-30.3N 016-09.3E
E. 70-07.0N 013-09.1E

REEFERS TO NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 11/16
